caseDescription.title: caseDescription
caseDescription.description: The description for the support case. Should be auto-generated from the conversation context and confirmed by the learner before submission.

caseSubject.title: caseSubject
caseSubject.description: The subject line for the support case. Should be auto-generated from the conversation context and confirmed by the learner. Will be appended with the Learning Rubric name.

userId.title: userId
userId.description: The Salesforce User Id of the learner. Defaults to the running user if left blank.

varLearningRubricId.title: varLearningRubricId
varLearningRubricId.description: The Learning_Rubric__c record Id from the context variable learningRubricId. Used to associate the case with the correct assessment and append the rubric name to the subject.
